category_sources: source_facts.description says this is the Vue.js language server; official vuejs/language-tools README describes the package as Vue language tooling and lists @vue/language-server.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is vue-language-server; official vuejs/language-tools README lists @vue/language-server as the language server package.
docs_sources: Official vuejs/language-tools package directory and GitHub wiki are the official documentation surfaces for the language server/tooling project.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage points to the official vuejs/language-tools GitHub repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Vue.js language server; official vuejs/language-tools README describes Vue language tooling based on Volar and lists @vue/language-server.
